glosses.vi: nữ anh hùng; nữ nhân vật chính
glosses.ja: ヒロイン; 女主人公

translations.vi: Hôm nay cô ấy là người hùng của tôi.
translations.nb: I dag er hun min heltinne.
translations.sv: I dag är hon min hjälte.
translations.da: I dag er hun min heltinde.
translations.ja: 今日は彼女は私のヒーローだ。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame of the clause.
Finite present (3sg) copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular (3rd person feminine); subject of the clause.
Attributive possessive determiner (1st person singular), agreeing with the feminine nominative singular noun.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; predicate complement (predicative nominal) with the copula.

sentences.target: Im Film spielt Lea die Heldin.

translations.de: Im Film spielt Lea die Heldin.
translations.en: In the movie, Lea plays the hero.
translations.es: En la película, Lea interpreta a la heroína.
translations.fr: Dans le film, Lea joue l’héroïne.
translations.zh-Hans: 在电影里，莉娅演女主角。
translations.yue: 喺套戲入面，莉雅演女主角。
translations.pt: No filme, Lea interpreta a heroína.
translations.vi: Trong phim, Lea đóng vai người hùng.
translations.ar: في الفيلم، ليا تؤدي دور البطلة.
translations.nl: In de film speelt Lea de heldin.
translations.hu: A filmben Lea a hősnőt alakítja.
translations.hi: फिल्म में लिया नायिका का किरदार निभाती है.
translations.el: Στην ταινία, η Λέα παίζει την ηρωίδα.
translations.ro: În film, Lea joacă rolul eroinei.
translations.ja: 映画でレアは主人公を演じている。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem'; introduces a dative PP as a locative setting.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; complement of the preposition 'im'.
Finite present (3sg) main verb; predicates the clause.
Proper noun; nominative singular subject of 'spielt'.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular determiner for 'Heldin'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object indicating the role played.

sentences.target: Für mich war Oma immer eine Heldin.
sentences.reading: /fyːɐ̯ mɪç vaːʁ ˈoːma ˈɪmɐ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈhɛldɪn/

translations.de: Für mich war Oma immer eine Heldin.
translations.ipa: /fyːɐ̯ mɪç vaːʁ ˈoːma ˈɪmɐ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈhɛldɪn/
translations.en: For me, Grandma was always a hero.
translations.es: Para mí, mi abuela siempre fue una heroína.
translations.fr: Pour moi, ma grand-mère a toujours été une héroïne.
translations.it: Per me, la nonna è sempre stata un'eroina.
translations.zh-Hans: 对我来说，奶奶一直是个英雄。
translations.yue: 對我嚟講，阿嫲一直都係英雄。
translations.ru: Для меня бабушка всегда была героиней.
translations.pt: Para mim, a minha avó sempre foi uma heroína.
translations.tr: Benim için büyükannem her zaman bir kahramandı.
translations.vi: Với tôi, bà luôn là một người hùng.
translations.ar: بالنسبة לי كانت جدتي دائمًا بطلة.
translations.nl: Voor mij was oma altijd een heldin.
translations.uk: Для мене бабуся завжди була героїнею.
translations.hu: Számomra a nagymamám mindig hősnő volt.
translations.hi: मेरे लिए दादी हमेशा एक नायिका रही है.
translations.pl: Dla mnie babcia zawsze była bohaterką.
translations.el: Για μένα η γιαγιά ήταν πάντα ηρωίδα.
translations.nb: For meg var bestemoren min alltid en heltinne.
translations.id: Bagi saya, nenek selalu menjadi seorang pahlawan.
translations.sv: För mig var min mormor alltid en hjälte.
translations.ro: Pentru mine, bunica a fost mereu o eroină.
translations.cs: Pro mě byla babička vždy hrdinkou.
translations.da: For mig var min mormor altid en heltinde.
translations.fi: Minulle isoäitini on aina ollut sankari.
translations.ja: 私にとって、祖母はいつもヒーローだった。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP expressing viewpoint/stance.
Personal pronoun, accusative singular (1st person); object of the preposition 'für'.
Finite preterite (3sg) copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Common noun; nominative singular subject (kinship term functioning as a noun).
Adverb of frequency; modifies the copular predicate.
Indefinite article; feminine nominative singular determiner for 'Heldin'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; predicate complement of the copula.

sentences.target: Die Lehrerin nennt Sara heute unsere Heldin.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈleːʁəʁɪn nɛnt ˈzaːʁa ˈhɔʏtə ˈʊnzəʁə ˈhɛldɪn/

translations.de: Die Lehrerin nennt Sara heute unsere Heldin.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈleːʁəʁɪn nɛnt ˈzaːʁa ˈhɔʏtə ˈʊnzəʁə ˈhɛldɪn/
translations.en: The teacher calls Sara our hero today.
translations.es: Hoy la profesora llama a Sara nuestra heroína.
translations.fr: La professeure appelle Sara notre héroïne aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi la maestra chiama Sara la nostra eroina.
translations.ko: 오늘 선생님이 사라를 우리 영웅이라고 부른다.
translations.zh-Hans: 老师今天称莎拉为我们的英雄。
translations.yue: 老師今日話莎拉係我哋嘅英雄。
translations.ru: Учительница сегодня называет Сару нашей героиней.
translations.pt: Hoje a professora chama a Sara de nossa heroína.
translations.he: המורה קוראת היום לשרה הגיבורה שלנו.
translations.tr: Öğretmeh bugün Sara’ya bizim kahramanımız diyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô giáo gọi Sara là người hùng của chúng ta.
translations.nl: De lerares noemt Sara vandaag onze heldin.
translations.uk: Учителька сьогодні називає Сару нашою героїнею.
translations.hu: A tanárnő ma Sárát a mi hősnőnknek nevezi.
translations.hi: शिक्षिका आज सारा को हमारी नायिका कहती है.
translations.pl: Nauczycielka dziś nazywa Sarę naszą bohaterką.
translations.el: Η δασκάλα σήμερα αποκαλεί τη Σάρα ηρωίδα μας.
translations.nb: Læreren kaller Sara vår heltinne i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini guru menyebut Sara pahlawan kita.
translations.sv: Läraren kallar Sara vår hjälte i dag.
translations.ro: Astăzi învățătoarea o numește pe Sara eroina noastră.
translations.cs: Učitelka dnes nazývá Saru naší hrdinkou.
translations.da: Læreren kalder Sara vores heltinde i dag.
translations.fi: Opettaja kutsuu tänään Saraa meidän sankariksi.
translations.ja: 先生は今日、サラを私たちのヒーローと呼ぶ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine nominative singular determiner for 'Lehrerin'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of 'nennt'.
Finite present (3sg) transitive verb; takes a direct object and an object-predicate (predicative accusative).
Proper noun; accusative singular direct object of 'nennt'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb phrase.
Attributive possessive determiner (1st person plural), agreeing with feminine accusative singular 'Heldin'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; object complement (predicative accusative) with 'nennen' describing 'Sara'.
